message:
fix(supply_chain): replace extension-registry shape checks with canonical signed-manifest admission kernel

Replace verify_signature() (hex shape check) and verify_provenance() (field
presence check) with AdmissionKernel that performs real Ed25519 signature
verification via artifact_signing and canonical provenance chain validation
via the provenance module. Admission preimage uses domain-separated
length-prefixed hashing binding manifest bytes, publisher key ID, VCS commit,
build system, and output hash.

New types: AdmissionKernel (shared across publish/install/audit flows),
AdmissionReceipt (per-evaluation), NegativeWitness (structured rejection).

42 tests pass including 8 adversarial cases: forged same-length signature,
reused signature over swapped manifest, unknown publisher key, truncated
signature, empty signature, empty provenance chain, revoked attestation link,
and stale attestation. Plus 2 regression tests proving shape-only checks
no longer work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
